CreateSubnet.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters long. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateSubnet.name: Subnet name. Cannot be "default". Up to 65 characters, consisting of digits, letters, and underscores.
CreateSubnet.enableIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 CIDR block. Set to true to enable; defaults to false.
CreateSubnet.zoneName: Availability zone name. Query method refers to [List Availability Zones](BCC/API参考/地域及可用区相关接口/查询可用区列表.md).
CreateSubnet.cidr: Subnet CIDR block, must fall within the CIDR range of the associated VPC.
CreateSubnet.vpcId: ID of the VPC to which the subnet belongs.
CreateSubnet.vpcSecondaryCidr: Secondary CIDR block of the VPC to which the subnet belongs.
CreateSubnet.subnetType: Subnet type. Valid values: BCC, BBC.
CreateSubnet.tags: List of tag key-value pairs to be created.
CreateSubnet.tags.tagKey: Tag key. May contain uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 1–65 characters.
CreateSubnet.tags.tagValue: Tag value. May contain uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /. Length: 0–65 characters.
